languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

languages.text: "Я чувствую себя так, словно на куски разваливаюсь, но голова вроде варит, если ты об этом. Ох. Про куски я зря сказала, да?"
"I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

"I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

languages.text: «Siento que me rompo en pedazos, pero es como si mi cabeza estuviera a punto de hervir, si eso es a lo que te refieres. Oh. No debería haber dicho lo de romperme en pedazos, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

traits.locale_text: «Siento que me rompo en pedazos, pero es como si mi cabeza estuviera a punto de hervir, si eso es a lo que te refieres. Oh. No debería haber dicho lo de romperme en pedazos, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: 「バラバラに崩れ落ちそうな気分だけど、頭のほうは今にも煮えくり返りそう――あんたが言いたいのがそういうことならね。あら。崩れ落ちそうなんて、言うべきじゃなかったかしら？」
languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

traits.locale_text: 「バラバラに崩れ落ちそうな気分だけど、頭のほうは今にも煮えくり返りそう――あんたが言いたいのがそういうことならね。あら。崩れ落ちそうなんて、言うべきじゃなかったかしら？」

languages.text: “我的确感觉自己快散架了，脑袋也在冒泡。哦，我不该说什么“散架”，对吧？”
languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

traits.locale_text: “我的确感觉自己快散架了，脑袋也在冒泡。哦，我不该说什么“散架”，对吧？”

languages.text: "Ich habe das Gefühl in Stücke zu zerfallen, aber mein Kopf scheint gleich überzukochen, wenn Ihr das meint. Oh! Das mit dem Auseinanderfallen hätte ich nicht sagen sollen, oder?"
languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe das Gefühl in Stücke zu zerfallen, aber mein Kopf scheint gleich überzukochen, wenn Ihr das meint. Oh! Das mit dem Auseinanderfallen hätte ich nicht sagen sollen, oder?"

languages.text: « J'ai l'impression de m'effondrer, mais ma tête, on dirait qu'elle va s'envoler... Si c'est à ça que vous faites référence. Oh. Je n'aurais peut-être pas dû mentionner la partie sur l'effondrement, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai l'impression de m'effondrer, mais ma tête, on dirait qu'elle va s'envoler... Si c'est à ça que vous faites référence. Oh. Je n'aurais peut-être pas dû mentionner la partie sur l'effondrement, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Parçalara ayrılıyormuşum gibi hissediyorum ama kafam sanki kaynayıp taşmak üzere, kastettiğin buysa tabii. Ah. Parçalara ayrılma kısmını söylememeliydim, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"
